utterances.speaker: The Conductor
utterances.text: Last stop , Montreal . This stop is Montreal .

emotion_cause.span: 1_Last stop , Montreal . This stop is Montreal .

utterances.speaker: Woman On Train
utterances.text: I made a bet with myself that you have beautiful eyes . Now that I see them , I win .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I made a bet with myself that you have beautiful eyes . Now that I see them , I win .

utterances.speaker: Woman On Train
utterances.text: We are at my stop . But would you like to have coffee ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Coffee sounds great . Wait , so , so you live in Montreal ?

utterances.speaker: Woman On Train
utterances.text: Oh , no . But it is just a two hour ferry ride to Nova Scotia .
